_about: Single source of truth for Zenodo asset URLs + sha256. Bumped on every Zenodo deposit revision. The downloader (scripts/download_checkpoints.sh) reads this and verifies sha256 on every pull. Per AIKI_GENANO_LAUNCH_HANDOFF.md anti-pattern #4: don't trust DOIs from memory.
_status: PLACEHOLDER — DOI not yet reserved on Zenodo. Bump record_doi + per-asset urls + per-asset sha256 after the upload, before any GHCR push.

SFT.description: ProtGPT2 fine-tuned on 1.35M nanobody-epitope pairs (paper Stage 1, full merged model).

DPO.description: DPO LoRA adapter (paper Stage 2, checkpoint-6000) trained on top of SFT.

GDPO_DPO.description: GDPO LoRA adapter from DPO init (paper headline, checkpoint-2000).

GDPO_SFT.description: GDPO LoRA adapter from SFT init (paper ablation, checkpoint-2000).

training_subset.description: 10-target representative subset of the screening data + matched DPO pairs.
